settings.small_text:
For one week only, Club Inspire is getting supercharged! 

And we’re giving Club Inspire Members the chance to win free shipping for a whole year!

But it doesn’t stop there. Every day brings a new crafty bonus. From surprise freebies to chances to win exclusive prizes, there’s something exciting waiting for you every time you visit.

Whether you’ve just joined the club or you’ve already reached Platinum status, you won’t want to miss a single moment of the fun.

settings.heading: We’ve Supercharged Crafter’s TV All Week!
Terms and Conditions - Free shipping for one year
settings.text:
One winner will be randomly chosen from all orders placed within the dates for the Club Inspire Supercharged event (8am BST Monday 8th June - 11:59pm Sunday 15th). Winner will receive FREE shipping for one year from the Crafter’s Companion website.

Must be a registered member of our Club Inspire loyalty programme, aged 18 years or older, prior to purchase to be entered to win. You can register for free here.

All orders placed between 8am BST Monday 8th June - 11:59pm Sunday 15th June are eligible. Every $£€25 spend earns you one entry in the random draw.

Free shipping will be valid for one account and email address only. The minimum spend per order to receive free shipping will be $25 in the US; there is no minimum spend in the UK or EU.

Carrier and shipping partner will be determined by Crafter’s Companion. Express shipping may not be applicable to the winner of this promotion.

Free shipping will be reflected at the checkout for the winner of the promotion.

Winner will be notified directly via email no later than 18th June 2025.

settings.heading: Terms and Conditions - Craft Together Class with Leann
settings.text:
Must receive ticket in parcel and register to claim no later than Sunday 22nd June 2025.

Tickets will be placed in fifty (50) parcels chosen at random from all orders placed on Thursday 12th June 2025.

Must be logged into Club Inspire prior to purchase.
